title: goniopteris meniscioides
intro: Goniopteris meniscioides, also known as the shield fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Goniopteris meniscioides include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, as well as protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
